agent.plan.description: Break the request into a concrete frontend implementation plan.

goal.description: Short description of the build goal.

agent.inspect.description: Inspect the current project tree or a specific set of files.

targets.description: Optional absolute project paths to inspect.

agent.search.description: Search filenames and file contents for a query.

query.description: Text to search for across the current project.

agent.read.description: Read specific files before editing them.

agent.create.description: Create one or more new frontend files.

intent.description: Short reason for the new files.

files.description: Map of absolute project paths to full file contents. MUST be an object. Example: { "/src/App.tsx": { "code": "import React..." } }

targets.description: Optional path list matching the written files.

agent.edit.description: Update one or more existing frontend files.

files.description: Map of absolute project paths to full file contents. MUST be an object. Example: { "/src/App.tsx": { "code": "import React..." } }

targets.description: Optional path list matching the written files.

agent.rename.description: Rename a file without changing its contents.

agent.delete.description: Delete obsolete files from the project.

agent.verify.description: Run local consistency checks before finishing.

checks.description: Optional named checks such as entry exists or imports resolve.

agent.complete.description: Finish the request and commit final project metadata.

summary.description: Short summary of what was created or updated.

entry.description: Absolute path to the final entry file.

dependencies.description: Dependency map to merge into the project.
